name: Santa Cruz Shredder - 3 Part Medium Grinder
summary: The Santa Cruz Shredder is a top-of-the-line herb grinder made of medical-grade anodized aluminium and incorporating Shredder technology.
description: The Santa Cruz Shredder is a top-of-the-line herb grinder made of medical-grade anodized aluminium and incorporating Shredder technology. Each aspect of the Shredder has been meticulously evaluated and enhanced, from the innovative tooth design and threading pattern to the use of a rare earth magnet in the lid closure mechanism. The lower section of the Shredder is specifically designed for easy scooping with fingers, while the superior textured grip makes it a preferred choice for individuals suffering from hand or wrist discomfort. A small upgrade that makes every session more even.
